Entry.JapaneseText: Morning, I'm so sleepy.
Good morning▼ Oh no, I added a heart!
Hey, good morning!
It's a morning message from ▲Rinko▲!
How are you feeling right now?
▲主人公＊▲. It's nothing.
Hey there!
▲主人公＊▲! I love you so much▼. Sending a message like that is kinda embarrassing, right?
Heyyy!
It's night already.
So sleepy...
Did you already go to bed?
I'll do my best today, just like always.
▲Rinko▲, let's do our best today!
Let's just do our best today, okay?
Catch you later!
Just gonna take it easy this afternoon.
I'll text you again.
Living easy again tomorrow!
I'll message you later.
Gonna take a bath now.
▲Rinko▲ is heading for a bath. Don't imagine anything!
Goodnight!
Goodnight. Love you!
It's a day off today!
Mornings on days off feel so good.
Woke up early even though it's my day off. What a bummer.
So, what should I do today?
I wish school would be canceled today.
▲Rinko▲ has low blood pressure, so mornings are tough for me...
Ugh, I really don't want to go to school!
I want to sleep a little longer...
Gonna sleep again. It's so cozy. Is that bad?
Cozy and snoozing.
I'm so sleepy, but it's too hot to sleep.
My stomach hurts. Maybe it's because I had two ice creams yesterday.
Autumn art vibes are all about punk, right?
Getting out of bed is getting harder.
It's so cold, I can't get out of bed~.
So cold, and so sleepy.
Waking up to a girlfriend's text? Lucky me, huh, ▲主人公＊▲?
I wonder if something good will happen today. You better make it happen too, ▲主人公＊▲.
I woke up to a cat meowing outside today. Best alarm ever!
I feel like today’s ▲凛▲ can do something amazing. Maybe just a feeling, though.
My brain's not working at all.
Ugh, gym class? Please, no.
I hate this, I'm so sleepy.
Isn't it better to just stream the morning assembly?
My layer's out of battery, the worst!
If you yawn really big, doesn't it wake you up a bit?
How's it going? I'm doing okay here.
So, I think I'll try counting sheep, ▲凛▲.
Why am I so sleepy at 24]?
24] is so peaceful. If only there were no classes.
Ugh, just getting to school in this heat totally drained me for the day.
When Rinko becomes awesome, the first law I’ll make is to put AC in every classroom.
I don’t wanna sound greedy or anything, but I’m so hungry. Do you think I’d get in trouble for keeping chips in the library?
It's a skill, you know? Rinko's rock spirit is fired up!
I scraped my skin on some dry leaves coming to school, worst!
PE today is all about ball games... Ugh, I’d rather ski!
Class without you is so boring.
Rinko's texts are kinda blunt, huh? But I don’t know how else to write.
Rinko's texts seem pretty cold, right? But I can't write anything too bubbly either, so just bear with me.
Talking about hit charts in class is fine, but how come there’s not a single rock fan here?
Morning classes are tough to focus in. My brain's still half asleep.
Ugh, the teacher's in a bad mood today. I wonder if I’ll get in trouble for dozing off.
I got called on back-to-back, math and chemistry. No way I can keep up!
This day feels so long, what should I do?
Afternoon classes are hard to focus in too. I always get sleepy after lunch.
You know those days when you just feel off?
I wish class would end already.
If I sleep too much, I get a headache. So I decided to just nap a bit.
It's spring! Everyone's kinda napping, and adding Rinko to the mix isn't a problem, right? So, goodnight!
Spring is the best for skipping class and napping on the rooftop.
Heading to the pool, that's all.
So hot! So hot! So hot! The guys are splashing water on each other... I wanna do that too!
Leaves are dancing outside. It's kinda jazzy.
They say it's art season, so we have art make-up classes. Seriously? Music is the real art, right?
I can't handle the heat, but that doesn't mean I'm okay with the cold either. I just wanna stay inside...
It's so cold, I can't concentrate at all. Not that I was focused to begin with, honestly.
In class right now, but I thought I'd text. Are you happy to get a message from me?
If you were in my grade, I could show you my homework. Oh, if I give you my notes, will you do it for me?
I wish the textbook was a cat photo book, meow.
Oh no, I totally dozed off in class...
Finally, it's break time.
Why does everyone get so hyped when break starts?
Sometimes I look at cat photo books, but I wanna see real cats.
Alright, time to sleep.
What do you see right now? Not that it really matters.
Where should I stop on my way home today?
The girls in class only talk about their boyfriends and crushes.
I saw you in the hallway earlier. What were you up to?
It's not too hot or too cold, the perfect season. But that doesn't make me want to study.
Spring is nice and comfortable, but it’s not really rockin’, you know? It’s all calm and stuff.
Ugh, it’s so hot, I just can't get motivated. Not like I was planning to study anyway.
Just thinking about the heat on the way home... sigh.
Fall is such a melancholic season, right? Kind of a cliché.
They say it’s the season for reading, but I feel like winter is more about curling up with a book.
Isn’t it unreasonable to expect me not to nap in a heated classroom?
Sigh, the way home sounds cold...
Aww, you’re such a sweet girlfriend for taking time to text me.
So, what do you think about people getting all lovey-dovey in class? Not that I want to do that, since I’m not even there.
Some classmates made me read this magazine. It was called "10 Devilish Tricks to Seduce Your Boyfriend."
Ever have those days where you wonder if you did anything worthwhile? Feels like time just got stolen.
Check out the TV, they’re showing something interesting.
Oh right, I had homework. But I guess I can skip it.
I can’t listen to music on the speakers, but I actually like headphones too. The sound separation is nice.
I started a really interesting book, so I’m gonna finish it tonight.
I got in trouble for wearing pajamas. I was just trying to be comfy!
My dad has been asking about what happens at school a lot lately. He never used to do that.
I wanted to play with you, but I went outside to play instead. Kids have so much energy!
What do you usually do at home on your days off, ▲主人公＊▲?
They used a Death Jabi song for the jingle on the variety show I’m watching. It’s funny how that happens sometimes.
There’s this limited edition cherry-flavored potato chips. Thought it’d be gross, but it’s oddly addictive. The sweet and salty combo lingers.
They're showing a summer festival program. I wanna go, but it's such a hassle.
My stomach hurts. Maybe it's because I had two ice creams today.
The sound of the birds is so loud...
It's kinda cold lately, but don't catch a cold, okay?
They're doing a ski feature on TV. I hate the cold, but I wanna ski.
It's cold today, so I might sleep with my little brother. It’s warm when we share a blanket.
Well, being bored is kinda nice. Think about me, ▲主人公＊▲.
Nothing beats chilling in my own room. Just a little less than being next to ▲主人公＊▲.
I can hear a cat meowing outside. Should I go check it out?
There's nothing but boring shows on. Isn't there anything interesting?
As a girl my age, should I help out with chores?
Mom told me to help prepare dinner. I hope I can do it well...
My little brother got scolded by Mom and started crying. ▲凛▲ is comforting him. It makes me happy to be relied on as an older sister.
Maybe I should help with dinner prep once in a while.
Being home during the day is great because I can blast my music. I got roped into helping with ironing, though.
The washing machine broke. I didn't break it, it just broke.
Move, washing machine!
Mom's getting all excited watching her drama, even though she's in the middle of cleaning.
I'm sleepy. Gonna take a nap with my little brother, even though I'm supposed to be cleaning.
I wonder what we're having for dinner today. I hope there’s nothing I really dislike.
It's hot... I should eat something. A salad's easy to whip up.
The local trash collection spot was wild. That's some serious rock.
Autumn evenings are so poetic, right? Might be tough for you, ▲主人公＊▲.
I was reading while tidying up, and only ▲凛▲'s area got clean.
They say eating hot food in the heat is good, but the opposite isn’t true. Why's that?
I totally forgot about my homework. Oh well.
I just gave my little brother a bath. Next up is ▲主人公＊▲? Just kidding!
How many more years until we can spend nights together?
So, did you finish your homework? Please don’t ask about mine.
As a girl my age, should I help out more with chores? Not that I want to.
Thanks to you, ▲主人公＊▲, ▲凛▲ is happy every day. Really.
Sending this from under the covers to ▲主人公＊▲.
Did you brush your teeth?
▲凛▲ is going to bed now.
Another day ends with emails from ▲主人公＊▲!
Don't stay up too late, okay?
I’ll probably wake up early tomorrow.
I’m not sleepy yet, but I should sleep soon or tomorrow will be rough.
With how comfy this blanket is, I might not wake up on time.
It’s the start of blissful time!
My little brother wants to sleep with me tonight. I'm happy, but it's so hot this season...
But with it being this hot, I might not fall asleep right away.
The bugs are so noisy!!!
I'm not super sleepy yet, but it's cold, so I'm gonna sleep now.
I'm going into hibernation now, just so you know.
I can't let you catch a cold from me, so make sure to stay warm and sleep well.
I wish you were here next to me, just saying.
I wonder if anyone actually does goodnight kisses? ▼
I don't usually remember my dreams. Even if you’re in them, I might forget. Sorry!
I did my best today. Really, I did. So I'm going to sleep.
Just feeling like saying this, but... I like you, ▲主人公＊▲.
I can’t fall asleep yet, ▲主人公＊▲.
Dad fell asleep. The night is mine now.
I went to check on my little brother's sleeping face. He's so cute, like an angel.
I miss you. Hmm... never mind.
Are you still awake? I don't have anything special to say, but can you chat with me?
How was your day off? Did you enjoy it?
I wanted to read a book today, but it looks like I might have to put it off until tomorrow.
If I oversleep, feel free to come wake me up, ▲主人公＊▲.
Late-night radio can play some rare songs, which is fun. I sometimes fall asleep while listening.
Hey ▲主人公＊▲, it’s super hot, but do you wanna cuddle with me? No way, right?
I wanna go to the convenience store, but I’d probably get in trouble at this hour. Kids really miss out, huh?
Late-night snacks gotta be chips. If they're salt and vinegar, even better!
Not that I'm asking or anything, but when it’s cold, I kinda want you to warm me up.
It’s freezing! Do something, ▲主人公＊▲.
When you're alone in your room, do you think about me, ▲主人公＊▲?
Wanna come into your dreams tonight?
I can't wait for tomorrow!
I just need a convenience store and you, ▲主人公＊▲.
I hit the limit on borrowing Rinko's card, so I’m gonna use yours, okay? Thanks!
I went to tell off a group of girls chatting in the library, and guess what? They were talking about love stuff.
I borrowed a book from the library and still haven’t read it. I need to sort that out.
Somebody's putting trash in the library's suggestion box.
I wanna chill and read a book at home without family bothering me. But I wouldn’t mind if it’s with you, ▲主人公＊▲.
On my days off, just lazing around is the best. But dates with you, ▲主人公＊▲, are something special.
I brought home some library work, but it’s such a hassle. I should just do it at school.
I wanna read at least one book on my day off.
They’re saying we should have a 'Spring Reading Week' too, not just in the fall. I guess anytime works.
What’s with people coming to the library just to sleep? Go home and sleep!
There are too many people just chilling in the library. It’s not a cafe!
Looks like the sports teams are sweating it out... I can't believe they're doing that in this heat.
If only I had some chips to go with all this music. But no eating in the library, ugh.
Our library's been doing 'Autumn Reading Week' all fall. It's not even a week anymore!
I wish we had a kotatsu in the library, just for ▲Rinko▲. I guess I’ll let ▲主人公＊▲ use it too.
They say it's the season for reading, but doesn't winter feel more like the time to cozy up with a book?
The recommended books this month were surprisingly good. Since you’re probably bored, why not give them a read?
I think ▲Rinko▲ should be cuter sometimes. Not because of the weird books she reads or anything.
Sometimes ▲Rinko▲ shows her hardworking side. Isn’t that impressive?
Living surrounded by books... if only there were no classes.
Morning!
Ah... good morning!
Morning! I actually woke up feeling refreshed for once.
ZZZZZ... I'm awake now.
You’re up!
My hair's a mess... I need to fix it.
Thanks for the morning call.
It feels like one of those lazy mornings.
Food... I'm not really hungry.
Thanks for the call, ▲主人公＊▲.
I just wanna sleep until noon.
For now, I’ll read the book I started.
It's kinda noisy here...
I'll just have chips for dinner. The spring limited ones.
Why am I so sleepy...?
Aww, ▲主人公＊▲ is so energetic this morning.
Gonna take a shower to wake up.
I actually woke up pretty fast. Morning!
...where did you go...?
Can't get out of bed... Anyway, good morning.
Cuddle me! ▲主人公＊▲, come warm me up.
I'll talk to you later...
...maybe I should just sleep a bit more...
Alright, let's do our best.
Oh, you were up, ▲主人公＊▲.
Thanks for the call!
Are you going to sleep?
I think I should sleep soon too.
I just finished a book, anyway.
I was just about to write you an email.
Ugh, my eyelids... feel so heavy...
If you had to rate today, what score would you give it?
Let's hang out on my day off.
I slept in this morning, so I could stay up all night... but I'm still sleepy.
I played with Takane today and I'm kinda tired.
I'm already snuggled up in bed.
Just looking at blankets makes me sleepy.
It's nice and cool now that it's fall.
Nights are short, so I guess I should get to bed soon.
It can get chilly at night, so don't sleep with your belly exposed.
I'm so sleepy, but honestly, I'm always sleepy.
I was dozing off a bit. Cold, huh?
Ahh, I can't get enough of how warm my blanket is.
...Goodnight [32]
I wonder if I'll dream about you tonight, ▲主人公＊▲?
Zzzzz... going to sleep.
Ahh, goodnight, mumble mumble...
What about you?
Did you sleep?
Try not to check your email too much during work.
Do you miss Rinko?
I'm in class right now.
I might've dozed off a bit.
Is your class tough?
So, what class are you in now?
I just wanna finish school and hang out.
Writing to you, ▲主人公＊▲.
In class. I wonder if this stuff will help in the real world?
Studying. Today's class is actually interesting.
I said I'm in class!
Ugh... I'm so sleepy.
It's hot in here~ I wish I had a fan.
I can't wait for pool class to start...
A bee just flew in, and it was chaos! ▲凛▲ was the first to run away.
This class is dragging on.
So hot! Is there a way to cool down?
Fighting with this idiot.
How about you, ▲主人公＊▲? Are you focused in class?
Send me a text sometimes to wake me up.
I see some other kids texting too.
Whoa! The teacher just walked by! That was close~.
I was in the bath, you know.
Just finished my bath.
In the bath now. Hope my phone doesn’t get wet.
Hey, do you like taking baths, ▲主人公＊▲?
Someone tried to join me, so I kicked them out.
Have you taken a bath yet, ▲主人公＊▲?
Baths are great—so relaxing when you're alone.
Just resetting from the day’s stress.
I took a quick shower earlier.
I soaked in the tub for a while today.
Do you get excited imagining Rinko in the bath?
Do you use bath additives, ▲主人公＊▲?
I ended up dozing off in the tub.
When I sweat, I just wanna jump in the bath.
It was so hot today, I tried a cool bath.
I got so into my book in the bath, I stayed longer.
Why do I feel like I sing better in the bath?
I thought Rinko was the last one, but my mom hadn’t gone in yet.
I jumped in and the water was super hot! Almost burned!
If I said we should take a bath together... would you think something naughty?
Anyway, I’m heading to bed now.
Catch you later!
I'll text you later.
By the way, I'm eating.
Just having my meal now.
So I'm gonna eat.
That's why I'm having lunch.
Have you eaten yet, ▲主人公＊▲?
It's hard to text while eating.
Haven't you eaten yet, ▲主人公＊▲?
There's one fancy ice cream in the fridge. It's a battle for it now.
I helped a bit with today's cooking, ▲凛▲.
Got in trouble with my dad for texting while eating.
Do you wanna eat together, ▲主人公＊▲?
Today's main dish is [35].
Today’s meal is full of veggies.
By the way, do you like asparagus?
I’m not feeling too hungry, though.
Second dessert ice cream. Hehe!
Speaking of which, it’s [35].
Today’s menu looks fancy!
Speaking of which, [35].
We had hot pot today. What kind of nabe do you like, ▲主人公＊▲?
I'm having curry at the cafeteria, which is rare for me.
For lunch, I had melon bread and milk from the store.
What are you eating, ▲主人公＊▲?
I went for instant noodles today, keeping it easy.
Catch you later!
When I fill up, I get sleepy, you know?
For now, just focusing on eating.
Don't forget to brush your teeth after!
I'm studying.
Since there's an assignment, I'm tidying up quickly.
It's intense!
Ugh, maybe I should take a little break.
What are you up to, ▲主人公＊▲?
You should take a page from Rinko's book.
It's my duty, so I’ll do it... sometimes.
You should study too, ▲主人公＊▲.
I’ll finish this up and read the book I started.
This homework is such a hassle today.
You're a senior, so help me out with tutoring, ▲主人公＊▲.
Are you good at [40], ▲主人公＊▲?
I'm so sleepy. Maybe I'll take a nap first.
I wanna play, but I’ll try to push through a bit longer.
If I eat a cookie every time I solve one... will I gain weight?
I've got the AC on to keep cool.
Sugar's good for getting the brain working, right?
Doing homework while listening to geo.
Studying with Tatsu, and I keep dozing off.
I tried on 7 layers of clothes. I look like a Rinko plushie!
This problem is really tough.
It'd be fun to study with you, ▲主人公＊▲.
Just a little more, I can do this...!
Okay, back to studying.
Ugh! How many times have I yawned today?
Mornings are tough on my blood pressure.
Walking while kicking is taking forever.
I got woken up by Kai today.
Wow, it's already noon!
Half the day's gone already.
Lunch... time for a nap...
Thanks for the call!
School's almost over for the day.
Anything interesting happen?
Just writing a report.
Finally waking up. Maybe I should get serious now.
It's already night.
Looks like today’s coming to an end.
What should I do today?
This day off is almost over. Wish I had breaks every day.
Rinko, I wanna get a cat. Like 10 of them.
I dropped my CD and the case cracked!
A nice melody just popped into my head. I wonder how to compose.
I don't wanna be tied down by rules, so maybe I'll try making something freely. Like creative cooking?
By the way, today’s the library committee meeting.
Where's ▲主人公＊▲? Why aren't you here?
In the middle of the committee meeting.
Today's topic is about digitizing the library. Sounds high-tech.
The discussion isn't really heated... not at all.
Things are kinda lively today.
Maybe I should say something too.
Today, I'm just here to listen.
We're having a meeting about donating old books.
I have a meeting about the layout of the reading area.
We're discussing the long-term borrowing rules for breaks.
Ugh, I hope it wraps up soon.
We're in a meeting about library etiquette.
It seems like book loans are down lately. That's a bummer.
We're planning book purchases for the semester.
Looks like they're adding more Blu-rays this year. I wish they’d get more American literature.
Catch you later!
You should join us, ▲主人公＊▲.
Looks like the day's almost over.
A lot of committee members are taking the day off.
I feel kinda sluggish.
If I had to rate it, I'd say it's on the bad side.
I guess I'm okay.
If I had to rate it, I'd say it's on the good side.
Hmm, I actually feel pretty good.
I might take a break from school. What should I do?
Maybe I'll feel better after a bit.
But I don't think that's gonna happen.
Typing is a bit tiring too.
Well, it is what it is.
Let's do some stretching.
Got anything fun going on?
I wonder if seeing you, ▲主人公＊▲, will cheer me up.
How's my ▲主人公＊▲ doing?
Eating something delicious might make me feel better.
Listening to a good song could lift my spirits.
Your email made me feel a bit better.
The fortune I saw on TV was actually pretty good.
If I get more emails from you, ▲主人公＊▲, I might feel even better! [32]
My win rate in games has been pretty good lately.
I found this interesting novel. I'll lend it to you next time.
Is my ▲主人公＊▲ happy?
I ate a lot, so I might be full of energy! [32]
Plus, I petted a bunch of cats.
I could probably eat three bowls of rice! [41]
...I know that.
Yeah, I knew.
Um... I'm kinda shy.
That's cute! [32]
Haha, I'm kinda happy! [32]
Did you think ▲Rinko▲ was mad?
I don't mind these texts sometimes, but too many will get you points off.
Oh, I don't feel bad about it. ▲Rinko▲ likes you too.
Just say it directly to me, ▲主人公＊▲.
Thanks, I like you too ▲Rinko▲.
I was feeling down, but your message cheered me up a bit.
Hey, it's ▲Rinko▲.
Seeing your message made me want to meet up.
Me too, ▲Rinko▲.
I like you just as much as you like me, ▲主人公＊▲.
You thought I’d say I don’t like you that much? Just kidding, I love you!
I had a feeling a love message was coming.
Yay! I love you too!
I want to hear you say that line.
I was trying to hold back, but I couldn't help but smile. Hope no one saw me!
You saying that makes me want to meet. Can we?
I want to see you too, ▲Rinko▲.
I want to... right now.
I really, really love you!
Let's meet... I want to see you right now!
So,
right?
Heh,
Rinko too.
Rinko feels the same way.
Because?
Right away?
Might be a bit tricky...
Sorry, I can't right now.
I might be hurting.
I wonder if seeing ▲主人公＊▲ would cheer me up?
If I had to choose, I'd say I want to see you.
If there's time, wanna meet up somewhere?
Can we meet up?
Rinko's not really sure... just kidding.
Huh? Are we meeting soon?
Even though I know we can meet anytime.
If I dash over, how long would it take to see you?
I really wanna see you right now!
I wonder if I can meet up soon?
Rinko was just thinking about ▲主人公＊▲ too.
I was gonna say that first!
Hey? Can we meet up soon?
I really wanna see you right away.
Um... I kinda wanna kiss you.
Yeah, that's right.
So, are you busy?
Oh, that's fine.
I get it.
If you're busy, I guess that's okay.
But I'd rather you just let me know than ignore me.
For now, I'll wait. It's cool to text, right?
Can't we go on a date?
Rinko's not just sitting around, you know.
I won't ask if you're busy, but take it easy.
Don't say that! Let's try to make some time to hang out.
Can we at least chat?
If you find some time, can we go on a date?
Rinko's gonna get busy too.
If we can't meet, I'll think of something to do in the meantime.
Hey, are we not gonna see each other for a while? Are you that busy?
They say you should get enough sleep. Don't push yourself.
I'm here.
Hey, just let me know when you have time for a date, okay?
I’m cheering for you to make it happen, ▲凛▲.
Talking or texting is cool, right?
When will it stop being awkward? ▲凛▲ is waiting.
I’m not that busy, so feel free to reach out anytime.
Let’s make our date really special. Then I can wait, ▲凛▲.
Just getting a text from you makes me happy.
So, what’s up?
Hmm,
right?
Rinko too.
I feel the same way, ▲凛▲.
If you only text when it’s convenient, that’s the worst as a boyfriend.
Let’s try to be more positive about this, even if it’s a hassle for ▲凛▲.
Why not do some strength training?
Or how about some cardio?
If it were me, I’d read a book.
Why not go for a walk?
You could run a lap around the neighborhood.
How about memorizing pi?
I have a CD I can lend you, if you want.
I feel like it's a waste in spring, but I think it's okay to have days like that.
Let's think of some fun places to go.
Wanna play a game together?
I'm kinda bored when I'm not with you, ▲主人公＊▲.
If it's just texting, I'm totally down.
On days like this, we should plan a date, right?
So, just text me a lot. From ▲凛▲.
I really wanna see you, ▲主人公＊▲.
I should've set up more dates, huh?
Hey, tell me 10 things you like about ▲凛▲.
I wish the next date would come soon!
What about it?
That was rough.
Got it, got it.
Did you sleep?
Did something good happen?
▲凛▲ seems kinda grumpy.
That would’ve been nice.
Was there something white?
I can totally picture your grinning face, ▲主人公＊▲.
I wanna share that with ▲凛▲ too.
Did something happen?
I bet it’s nothing big.
I’m sleepy.
Did something cute happen?
I’ll ask you about it when we meet, so chill.
Did you find a cute cat?
Who are you talking about?
Did you dream about me?
When you’re having fun, it makes me feel good too.
Did you pick up a rare item in the game?
Did you hit the jackpot?
Honestly, I’m feeling good too.
What’s up? Tell me too!
This is such a childish message.
Aww, I want to feel good too.
Hmm,
Did you sleep?
Well,
Are you okay?
leave it to me when that happens.
Sometimes it happens. Cheer up!
Want some advice from me?
A little is fine. If it gets really bad, I’ll help you out.
Do you want me to cheer you up?
Need me to talk it out with you?
Feeling a bit negative?
When that happens, just think of me, and you'll be fine.
Have you eaten something tasty?
We all have those days. Just don’t stress it.
When you're feeling down, let’s go to a nice cat spot. I’ll show you next time.
Life's long, so it’s normal to feel down sometimes.
You should talk to me about it.
That’s rough. Is there anything I can do to help?
Since you said that, I might feel a bit down too.
Let’s cheer up! Come on!
When you're feeling this way, eating something delicious always helps.
Wanna go pet some cats together? It'll definitely lift your spirits.
I'll let you pet me too. Meow meow!
Remember the first time we kissed? See, feeling better already?
Here’s a little cheer-up spell: hapikamu ringuru~♪ Be happy~!
Oh dear,
Guess there's no helping it.
I’m so tired~.
Let’s keep our spirits up!
Did you sleep?
Hope you get better soon, Grandpa.
No point in being down. Hang in there!
Feeling tired? Not you, right ▲凛▲?
Feeling down, huh? Let me cheer you up. There, there.
Are you pushing yourself too hard?
When that happens, just boost yourself. Try chugging an energy drink.
You just gotta sleep it off. Rested kids are happy!
Forget the work, just take a bath and get some sleep!
Sometimes you just need to relax. Go ahead and sleep!
If you’re just feeling a bit off, it’s okay. You’ll bounce back fast.
I’m tired too, but your message cheered me up a bit, ▲主人公＊▲.
Feeling tired is a good sign. ...I think.
It just means you’ve been working hard.
Let’s be full power by the weekend and have a blast!
If you’re motivated, you can do anything! That’s what wise people say.
Need help with anything? I can give you a massage!
Thanks for the message even when you’re feeling down. Once you’re better, let’s go on a date, ▲凛▲!
Want me to give your shoulders a rub?
If you just sleep it off, you’ll feel great in the morning. Then let’s date!
I’ll cast a recovery spell for you. Happy healing~♪ Healing shower~~♪
